title: Harmonize – UI Overhaul
description: Harmonize transforms your Minecraft experience with a unified visual design. Every container interface now features a consistent layout that perfectly aligns with your hotbar. No more jarring visual jumps between different workstations!
body:
# **✨ Harmonize**   > **A mod that unifies and enhances all Minecraft interfaces, making them consistent, polished, and pleasant to use.** Harmonize transforms your Minecraft GUI experience with a sleek, unified visual design. Every container interface—from crafting tables to enchanting stations—now features a consistent layout that perfectly aligns with your hotbar. No more jarring visual jumps between different workstations!    *** ## **🎯 What does this mod do?** Ever noticed that Minecraft's menus feel… inconsistent? Different spacing, misaligned elements, behaviors that vary from one menu to another. **Harmonize** fixes all of that. **__Simple. Clean. Harmonized.__**   *** ## **✨ Key Features**
✨Standardized container GUIs with premium alignment
🎯Unified hotbar and inventory slot positioning across ALL workstations
🎨Custom hotbar sprite with a refined, modern look
🖼️Adjusted item textures for visual consistency
🔧HUD elements that move in perfect harmony
🖐️Offhand slot accessible from every single menu
🎭Consistent hover feedback across all interfaces

 

*** ## **🖼️ Before & After** ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1407984/description_2cc78baa-8f4b-4689-8948-767e4fc66488.gif)![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1407984/description_60b13a62-da86-49ea-93b5-e1f71ae91e1e.gif)   *** ## **🖐️ Universal Offhand Slot** One of the most useful improvements: **your off-hand slot is now available in ALL menus**. No more closing the chest to switch your torch or shield. ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1407984/description_53d09554-a382-4ba2-8fb7-75631a1b6e50.gif) ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1407984/description_9c88f270-ba7a-487a-8283-35af60c05340.gif) ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1407984/description_3e55979a-291c-4556-950d-9193ca3c23a2.gif)   *** ## **📋 Improved Menus** ### ✅ Completed **Storage:** * ✅ Chest (Single & Double) * ✅ Ender Chest * ✅ Shulker Box * ✅ Dispenser / Dropper * ✅ Hopper **Crafting & Processing:** * ✅ Crafting Table * ✅ Furnace / Blast Furnace / Smoker * ✅ Brewing Stand * ✅ Crafter **Equipment Upgrade:** * ✅ Anvil * ✅ Smithing Table * ✅ Grindstone * ✅ Enchanting Table * ✅ Beacon **Decoration:** * ✅ Loom * ✅ Cartography Table * ✅ Stonecutter **Mounts:** * ✅ Horse / Donkey / Mule / Llama **Player:** * ✅ Player Inventory * ✅ Villager Trading ### ❌ Coming Soon * ❌ Creative Menu   *** ## **🔍 Category Details** ### 📦 Storage All containers now have the offhand slot visible and perfectly aligned inventory. ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1407984/description_e1ef41ab-76a1-476f-8a93-18b126c4053f.gif) *** ### 🔥 Furnaces All three furnace types share the same clean, consistent design. ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1407984/description_cf069a3c-74f8-4bbd-bc6b-734373045e4f.gif) *** ### ⚔️ Equipment Upgrade Tables Anvil, Smithing Table and Grindstone with improved slot distribution and integrated offhand. ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1407984/description_273d3783-e2cf-4df6-9bb9-7444028905c9.gif) *** ### ✨ Enchanting Table Enchantment buttons with precise click areas and improved visual feedback. ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1407984/description_65d61062-7508-4d72-9bd2-e4c1ce0e98d0.gif) *** ### 🧪 Brewing Stand Reorganized slots for better visual clarity. The offhand lets you keep extra ingredients handy. ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1407984/description_a83b8412-ac28-4e60-8c95-8a70630ea376.gif) *** ### 🎨 Decoration Tables Loom, Cartography and Stonecutter with clean, consistent interfaces. ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1407984/description_b3e9c209-5bca-4640-af5f-36988e00fdc2.gif) *** ### 🐴 Mounts Horse, donkey, mule, llama and nautilus inventories with better organization and offhand access. ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1407984/description_5dc56a70-56ee-4501-ab0d-bc80366f977f.gif)   *** ## **🎮 Compatibility**
  
Minecraft1.21.11
Mod LoaderFabric
RequiresFabric API

 

***~~~~ ## **📥 Installation** 1. Download and install [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/) 2. Download [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) 3. Download **Harmonize** 4. Place both `.jar` files in your `mods` folder 5. Done!   *** ## **❓ FAQ** **Does it affect performance?** > No. It only modifies interface appearance, no extra load. **Is it compatible with other mods?** > Yes, in most cases. Minor visual conflicts may occur with mods that modify the same interfaces. **Does it work on servers?** > Yes. It’s mainly a client-side visual mod, but it will only work fully if it is also integrated on the server. > >   *** > _"Consistency is the foundation of trust, in relationships and in interface design."_ ***   **Version:** 0.3 **Developer:** © 2025 Shamy\]™ Creative Studio **License:** CC0-1.0
